name: Q-8 honest scope behavior: validate script returns 0 on a README that documents solo-scale self-observation
command:
printf "# Project

This is solo-scale self-observation, not productivity science.
" > /tmp/q8-readme.md; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/space/honest-scope-validate.sh" --readme /tmp/q8-readme.md 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && echo accepts_caveat 1>&2
